info.title: Middleware Platform API Contract
info.description: Actual management API surface for configured Goravel Queue adapters, message routes and delivery records, dead letters, protection rules, and runtime metrics. Unsupported external brokers and online secret replacement are intentionally not modeled.

200.description: HTTP 200; business status is carried by the JSON code field.
HTTP 200; business status is carried by the JSON code field.

post.description: Registers one server-configured Goravel Queue connection. Arbitrary broker configuration is rejected.
